changeSet.author: codex
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS author_profile ( id BIGSERIAL PRIMARY KEY, profile_key VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL UNIQUE, name VARCHAR(128), gender VARCHAR(32), email VARCHAR(128), phone VARCHAR(64), age INTEGER, photo_provider VARCHAR(32), photo_object_key VARCHAR(512), photo_url VARCHAR(1024), photo_content_type VARCHAR(128), photo_content_length BIGINT, education_json TEXT, skill_json TEXT, work_experience_json TEXT, internship_experience_json TEXT, project_experience_json TEXT, custom_section_json TEXT, created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP );
